text:
The Mafia Community's Underground Auction (, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 71 Andāguraundo Ōkushon; , Chika Ōkushon; or , Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 72 Chika Kyōbai) is an annual event held at the beginning of September at the Cemetery Building in Yorknew City. All the Mafia families usually send their high-ranking representatives to attend the auction, and some Mafia bosses even go to the auction themselves because it is the place where they can show off their wealth to the rest of the community and make a name for themselves. There have even been cases of Mafia families entering bidding wars and ending up bankrupt. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 73 

Notable Incidents

The Underground Auction that takes place in 1999, the same year as the 287th Hunter Exam, is notable for being involved in a series of violent incidents:

On the night of September 1 st , the Phantom Troupe attacks the Cemetery Building to steal all the auction items, killing a large number of Mafia members and their clients in the process. Not knowing that the items were safely removed from the vault of the building by the Shadow Beast, Owl, the Mafia mobilizes a large number of members, including Kurapika and the other bodyguards of the Nostrade Family, to chase after the Troupe toward the Gordeau Desert. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 74 

The Mafia's superior numbers and conventional weapons, however, are no match for the battle prowess of Uvogin, and another massacre takes place. Four of the Shadow Beasts; Leech, Porcupine, Rabid Dog and Worm then arrive at the battlefield and attack Uvogin together. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 75 Although they manage to injure him, Uvogin eventually defeats them all. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 76 Kurapika then takes the opportunity to capture Uvogin using his Chain Jail. The Troupe immediately goes after Kurapika and his comrades, but their car is stopped on the way by the arrival of the remaining Shadow Beasts. The Troupe then kills all of them except Owl so they can steal the auction items. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 77 

They quickly find where Uvogin is being held captive and free him after killing Dalzollene, the head bodyguard of the Nostrade Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 78 On the night of September 2 nd , Uvogin is killed in a duel with Kurapika in the Gordeau Desert. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 10, Chapter 84 To avenge him, the Troupe launches another attack on the Cemetery Building on the night of September 3 rd , Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 96 killing approximately 2,000 Mafia members and a number of professional assassins hired by the Ten Dons. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 98 After the Dons are killed by Illumi Zoldyck, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 100 the Troupe creates fake corpses of themselves, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 101 steal all the auction items and continue the Underground Auction by using copies that will disappear in 24 hours. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 103 

Notable Items for Auction

The mummy of Princess Corco. 
Tissues used by the famous actor Sonne Limarch. 
A Solid-Gold Execution Sword from the Yul National Treasury. 
The last of its kind, a ‎‎Celadon Porcelain Vase from the Lai Dynasty. 
A pair of Scarlet Eyes from the Kurta Clan.
